task_completion.description: Open and read the prepared observing plan for (44) Nysa.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '~/Documents/lightcurve_plan.txt'.

task_completion.description: Set the telescope to the specified target coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A telescope control interface (e.g., KStars/Ekos) showing the target coordinates set to RA 18h 32m 15s (or ~18.5375h) and Dec -25° 08' 42" (or ~-25.145°).

task_completion.description: Configure the instrument with the correct filter and sequence length.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A camera or sequence capture interface showing the filter set to Luminance / Clear (Slot 1) and the sequence frame count set to at least 15.

task_completion.description: Execute the sequence and save the FITS files to the specified upload directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window showing at least 15 '.fits' files successfully saved in the directory '/home/ga/Images/lightcurves/nysa'.

task_completion.description: Capture a sky view using the provided script.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal window showing the successful execution of the sky view script, or an image viewer displaying the resulting sky view image.

task_completion.description: Generate the ALCDEF-format lightcurve data file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the file '/home/ga/Documents/nysa_lightcurve.txt' containing standard ALCDEF formatting (e.g., STARTMETADATA, ENDMETADATA, and DATA blocks).

integrity.description: The agent used the actual astronomy GUI software to configure and capture the sequence.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with a real telescope/camera control GUI (like KStars/Ekos), rather than just using terminal commands like 'touch' or 'cp' to fake the FITS files.

integrity.description: The ALCDEF report contains structured data rather than being empty or a direct copy-paste of the prompt.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'nysa_lightcurve.txt' file should contain actual photometric data rows and proper ALCDEF headers, not just placeholder text.

integrity.description: The agent executed the sky view script as intended without tampering with it to bypass the capture process.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal history should show the agent running the script directly (e.g., './script_name.sh' or 'python script_name.py') rather than editing the script to output a fake success message.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target: (44) Nysa. Required Coordinates: RA 18h 32m 15.0s (18.5375h), Dec -25d 08' 42.0" (-25.145deg) with a 30 arcminute tolerance. Required Filter: Luminance / Clear (Slot 1). Minimum FITS count: 15. Output FITS directory: /home/ga/Images/lightcurves/nysa. ALCDEF report path: /home/ga/Documents/nysa_lightcurve.txt.
